Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "GREENBERET-4000" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Green Beret.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out a JSR $0100 at $0790 to remove a check for connected disk drives or peripherals. This subroutine was designed to crash the game if any such devices were detected.
